gaps.title: ClickHouse appendEvent writes randomUUID() as span_id and empty parent_span_id
gaps.impact: Historical sessions loaded from ClickHouse have no span hierarchy -- SpanTree renders flat list or 'No spans'
gaps.resolution: runtime-executor.ts createCentralizedTraceHandler now passes traceEvent.id as spanId and tracks lastLlmSpanId for parent-child linking (tool_call → llm_call). clickhouse-trace-store.ts appendEvent() uses event.spanId and event.parentSpanId.

gaps.title: ClickHouse appendEvent writes empty agent_name
gaps.impact: Historical traces have no agent attribution -- WaterfallPanel cannot group by agent
gaps.resolution: runtime-executor.ts passes traceEvent.agentName to CH appendEvent. clickhouse-trace-store.ts uses event.agentName.

gaps.title: message.content can be ContentBlock[] not string
gaps.impact: Conversation tree shows 'User input' or '[object Object]' instead of actual text
gaps.fix: In buildConversationTree, extract text from ContentBlock array: Array.isArray(content) ? content.filter(b => b.type === 'text').map(b => b.text).join('') : content

gaps.title: In-memory TraceStore has 120-minute TTL and 500-event ring buffer
gaps.impact: Sessions older than 2 hours or with >500 events lose traces from memory
gaps.resolution: ClickHouse is now the canonical persistent store. In-memory is hot cache only. All read paths fall back to ClickHouse when memory is empty.

gaps.title: No per-span cost in ClickHouse writes
gaps.impact: Historical LLM cost is lost after memory eviction
gaps.resolution: createCentralizedTraceHandler creates chData with cost: 0 default for llm_call events. All LLM trace events now include cost field in ClickHouse data blob.

gaps.title: replayTraceEventsIntoObservatory creates synthetic spanId
gaps.impact: Replayed spans don't form parent-child hierarchy, waterfall is flat
gaps.resolution: replay-trace-events.ts:145 already prefers real spanId from eventData: `eventData.spanId || 'span-' + event.id`. parentSpanId also extracted at line 146. Combined with ClickHouse storing real span_id/parent_span_id (5.1.1), historical sessions now produce correct hierarchies.
gaps.verifiedBy: Code inspection: replay-trace-events.ts uses eventData.spanId and eventData.parentSpanId

gaps.title: TracesTab shows 'No spans' for historical sessions
gaps.resolution: Three-part fix: (1) ClickHouse stores real span_id/parent_span_id (5.1.1). (2) replay-trace-events.ts prefers real spanId/parentSpanId from eventData (5.1.6). (3) DebugTabs.tsx shows contextual 'traces_not_stored' message when spans Map is empty but aggregate metrics exist, instead of misleading 'Start a conversation' prompt.

gaps.title: No session list filters in UI
gaps.impact: Users must scroll through all sessions to find specific ones
gaps.fix: Add time range picker, status dropdown, channel dropdown, and session ID search. API already supports status and channel filters.

gaps.title: No CSV export button in UI
gaps.impact: Export endpoint exists but is unreachable from the UI
gaps.fix: Add export button to session list and session detail. Wire to GET /sessions/export?sessionIds=...

gaps.title: Analysis endpoint not wired to UI
gaps.impact: Server-side trace analysis is unused -- users cannot see automated diagnostics
gaps.fix: Add an 'Analysis' tab or panel in SessionDetailPage that calls GET /sessions/:id/analysis.

gaps.title: Agent-spec endpoint only works for active sessions
gaps.impact: Cannot view DSL/IR for historical sessions
gaps.fix: Add DB fallback in /agent-spec endpoint: look up agent by name from the session's currentAgent field.

gaps.title: Performance tab only shows in-memory data
gaps.impact: No LLM call history for historical sessions
gaps.resolution: Generations endpoint now falls back to ClickHouse when in-memory is empty (FIX-1.13-A). Performance tab can use this.
gaps.remaining: Wire useSessionTraces with types=llm_call filter in the UI component

gaps.title: No cost breakdown visualization
gaps.impact: Users see total cost but cannot identify which LLM calls are expensive
gaps.fix: Add a cost waterfall or bar chart to the Performance tab, aggregating per-LLM-call cost from trace events.

gaps.title: No dedicated GET /sessions/:id/metrics endpoint
gaps.impact: Client must fetch all traces and compute metrics locally (unreliable for large sessions)
gaps.resolution: Dedicated GET /sessions/:id/metrics endpoint implemented. Returns totalLLMCalls, totalToolCalls, totalTokensIn, totalTokensOut, totalTokens, totalCost, totalDurationMs, errorCount. Falls back to ClickHouse when in-memory is empty.

gaps.title: Generations endpoint only scans in-memory TraceStore (max 100 sessions)
gaps.impact: LLM call history is lost after memory eviction
gaps.resolution: GET /sessions/generations now falls back to ClickHouse when in-memory returns empty and sessionId filter is provided.

gaps.title: Export endpoint only reads from in-memory TraceStore
gaps.impact: Cannot export traces for historical sessions
gaps.resolution: Export endpoint now resolves runtimeSessionId from DB and falls back to queryClickHouseCanonicalTraces when in-memory is empty (FIX-1.12-A).

gaps.title: No GET /sessions/:id/messages endpoint
gaps.impact: Messages are bundled in the full session detail response -- cannot paginate messages independently
gaps.fix: Add a dedicated paginated messages endpoint. DB already supports findMessagesForSessionCursor().

gaps.title: OBS_TRACE_CANONICAL_READ env var gates ClickHouse trace reads
gaps.impact: ClickHouse canonical traces are opt-in, meaning most deployments use the lossy platform_events fallback
gaps.resolution: OBS_TRACE_CANONICAL_READ flag removed entirely. ClickHouse canonical traces are always read when isClickHouseTraceEnabled() returns true (USE_MONGO_CLICKHOUSE=true). No feature flag gating.

gaps.title: No bulk trace query across sessions
gaps.impact: Cannot correlate traces across related sessions (e.g., handoff chain)
gaps.fix: Add GET /sessions/traces?sessionIds=x,y,z that returns merged, chronologically sorted traces.
